title: Crystal Infused
description: Crystal Infused is a mod that adds new crystal ores to the game, that, when pure, allow you to upgrade enchantments to a level beyond the vanilla maximum
body:
# Crystal Infused

Crystal Infused is a fabric mod that adds 8 new crystal ores to the game. These crystals will allow you to enhance your enchanted books a level beyond the vanilla maximum - in a way that does not feel overpowered in the slightest!

There are plans to expand on the core mechanic and even add new features in the future, as well as to update to the latest versions! ## Current Content
The Crystals The eight crystals added in this mods are:

Ruby, Sapphire, Topaz, Amber, Peridot - all found in the caves.

Sugilite - found in the Nether.

Spinel - found in the End.

Pearl - found in the depths of the ocean.

Crystal Purifier The Crystal Purifier will allow you to purify the raw crystal you found. The fuel for it, however, may only be found in __a distant dimension!__

Crystal Infuser The Crystal Infuser takes in two pure crystals and a maximum-level enchanted book, and upgrades the enchantment by a level to exceed vanilla maximum. But in order to activate it - you may need to slay the __Three-headed Terror!__

Armor Trims Each Crystal also gets its own armor trim coloring!
## Language Support The mod supports the following languages: 🇺🇸 English, 🇬🇧 English, 🇫🇷 French, 🇪🇸 Spanish, 🇸🇦 Arabic, 🇮🇹 Italian, 🇮🇱 Hebrew, 🇯🇵 Japanese, 🇰🇷 Korean, 🇩🇪 German. ## License [MIT](https://choosealicense.com/licenses/mit/) Crystal-Infused is licensed under the MIT license.
